definition.title: Navigate global immigration with experts
definition.subtitle: Understanding Global Immigration Solutions
definition.description: Support your workforce wherever they are with the right visas and work permits to work legally.

trustSignals.title: Trusted by companies worldwide
trustSignals.subtitle: Numbers that reflect our commitment to excellence and client success.

keyPoints.title: Work visa processing
keyPoints.description: Complete handling of work visa applications, documentation, and approval processes for employees relocating internationally. We manage all paperwork, coordinate with embassies, and ensure timely approvals.

keyPoints.title: Work permit management
keyPoints.description: Expert management of work permits, renewals, and compliance requirements across multiple jurisdictions. We track expiration dates, handle renewals proactively, and maintain legal status.

keyPoints.title: Compliance assurance
keyPoints.description: Full compliance with local immigration laws, regulations, and requirements in every country. Our legal experts stay updated with regulatory changes and ensure full adherence.

keyPoints.title: Family visa support
keyPoints.description: Assistance with dependent visas and family reunification for employees' families. We help spouses and children obtain the necessary visas to accompany employees.

mainDescription.title: What is Immigration Services?
mainDescription.description: Immigration services provide expert guidance and support for obtaining work visas, permits, and legal authorization for employees to work in foreign countries. Our immigration solutions cover the entire visa application process, from initial assessment and documentation to embassy coordination and approval, ensuring compliance with immigration laws across 160+ countries while minimizing processing times and maximizing success rates.

services.title: Immigration services we offer
services.description: We provide end-to-end immigration services covering all aspects of international work authorization and compliance. From initial applications to ongoing support, we handle everything.

items.title: Work visa processing
items.description: Complete work visa applications for skilled workers, executives, and specialists. We handle all documentation, embassy coordination, and approval processes.

items.title: Work permit management
items.description: Comprehensive work permit services including applications, renewals, and extensions. We ensure continuous legal status for your employees.

items.title: Family visa support
items.description: Assistance with dependent visas and family reunification for employees' families. We help families stay together during international assignments.

items.title: Compliance & renewal
items.description: Ongoing compliance monitoring and timely renewal services to maintain legal status. We track deadlines and handle renewals proactively.

process.title: Immigration process
process.description: Our streamlined immigration process ensures fast, efficient, and compliant visa processing. From initial assessment to final approval, we guide you through every step.

steps.title: Initial assessment
steps.description: We assess your employee's eligibility, required visa type, and timeline for the target country. Our experts review qualifications, job requirements, and immigration pathways.

steps.title: Document preparation
steps.description: Our immigration experts prepare and organize all required documentation, ensuring accuracy and completeness. We handle translations, certifications, and all supporting materials.

steps.title: Application submission
steps.description: We submit the visa application to the appropriate immigration authorities and track the process. Our team handles all communications and responds to requests promptly.

steps.title: Approval & onboarding
steps.description: Once approved, we assist with visa collection, entry procedures, and ongoing compliance requirements. We ensure smooth transition and continued legal status.

eorBridge.title: Immigration + employer of record
eorBridge.description: Combine our immigration services with Employer of Record (EOR) solutions for a seamless global hiring experience. While immigration handles work authorization, EOR manages employment contracts, payroll, and compliance - giving you a complete solution for international expansion.

benefits.title: Streamlined process
benefits.description: Single point of contact for both immigration and employment needs. No need to coordinate between multiple vendors.

benefits.title: Faster time to hire
benefits.description: Coordinated approach reduces delays and accelerates the hiring process. Immigration and EOR teams work together seamlessly.

benefits.title: Complete compliance
benefits.description: Full compliance with both immigration and employment laws. Our integrated approach ensures no gaps in legal coverage.

benefits.title: Cost efficiency
benefits.description: Bundled services reduce administrative overhead and provide better pricing. One invoice, one relationship, one solution.

eorBridge.ctaText: Learn more about employer of record

items.question: How long does the visa application process take?
items.answer: Processing times vary by country and visa type. Typically, work visas take 2-8 weeks, but expedited processing is available for urgent cases. Our team provides realistic timelines based on your specific situation.

items.question: What documents are required for a work visa?
items.answer: Required documents vary by country but typically include: passport, employment contract, educational certificates, professional qualifications, medical certificates, and proof of financial means. We provide a complete checklist for each country.

items.question: Can you help with family visas?
items.answer: Yes, we assist with dependent visas for spouses and children. We handle the entire family visa application process, ensuring all family members can accompany the employee to their destination country.

items.question: What happens if a visa application is denied?
items.answer: If an application is denied, we review the reasons, address any issues, and can assist with appeals or reapplication. Our success rate is high due to thorough preparation and expert guidance.

items.question: Do you handle visa renewals?
items.answer: Yes, we proactively monitor visa expiration dates and handle renewals well in advance. We ensure continuous legal status for your employees and avoid any gaps in authorization.

items.question: How much do immigration services cost?
items.answer: Costs vary based on country, visa type, and complexity. We provide transparent pricing upfront with no hidden fees. Contact us for a customized quote based on your specific needs.

items.question: Can you assist with document preparation and submission?
items.answer: Yes. We handle document preparation, checklists, and submission for work visas and permits. We ensure applications are complete and compliant to minimize delays and rejections.

items.question: Do you work with companies that use an EOR for employment?
items.answer: Yes. We work closely with our EOR and payroll teams so that employment contracts and visa applications are aligned. Many clients use our EOR and immigration services together for a single, coordinated solution.

cta.title: Ready to streamline your immigration process
cta.description: Join hundreds of companies who trust us for their global immigration needs. Get started with expert visa processing and compliance support.
